title: Block History
description: A server utility that keeps track of placing/destroying of blocks
body:
A server utility that keeps track of when a player interacted a block. (Currently it can keep track of block placing/breaking and exploding)
This server utility is meant for server owners to be able to check who griefed someones area.

The logging of explosion damage can be turned off in the config.

The mod comes with the following commands:
/blockhistory (This shows the latest 10 changes in chat. The amount it shows in chat is configurable))
/blockhistory log (This logs the recorded history to a log.txt file located in the blockhistory folder within the mods folder)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
